name: INNOVATIVE SOLUTIONS & SUPPORT INC
summary: Innovative Solutions and Support, Inc. (ISSC) develops and manufactures avionics products including flight panel display systems, air data systems, ThrustSense Autothrottle, NextGen Flight Deck, COCKPIT/IP, and VMC-a Mitigation systems. The company serves both commercial and government aviation markets, providing cockpit modernization and upgrade solutions. ISSC holds domestic and international certifications for its products and targets general aviation, commercial, and military aircraft operators.

products.name: ThrustSense Autothrottle
products.description: Autothrottle system for aircraft cockpit automation and modernization.

products.name: COCKPIT/IP
products.description: Integrated cockpit display and flight deck modernization platform.

products.name: NextGen Flight Deck
products.description: Advanced flight deck system designed for aircraft cockpit upgrades.

products.name: Air Data Systems
products.description: Avionics air data measurement and management products for aircraft.

products.name: VMC-a Mitigation
products.description: System designed to mitigate visual meteorological conditions-related flight risks.

products.name: Flight Panel Display Systems
products.description: Electronic flight instrument display panels for cockpit modernization.
